description: The food.gdt dataset in Gretl contains household survey data with variables 'food_exp' and 'income'. Perform a model comparison analysis by estimating three regression models: a Linear Model (food_exp = β₀ + β₁·income), a Quadratic Model (food_exp = β₀ + β₁·income + β₂·income² using variable income_sq), and a Square Root Model (food_exp = β₀ + β₁·√income using variable sqrt_income). Create a report at ~/Documents/gretl_output/model_comparison.txt containing the labeled AIC and BIC values for all three models, a statement identifying the AIC-preferred model, and a statement identifying the BIC-preferred model.
